ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the security (e.g., EQ for equity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cisin" TEXT /* Capital ISIN (CISIN) */,
  "face_value" REAL /* Face value of the security */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the security belongs */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the security */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last trading date of the security */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the security (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for logging into the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the price data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the price data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the access was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID associated with the access event */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security the performance data belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage over the performance period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility (standard deviation) of the security's returns */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the security's returns */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown over the performance period */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the security's returns */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the security's returns */,
  "annualized_return" REAL /* Annualized return over the performance period */,
  "annualized_volatility" REAL /* Annualized volatility of the security's returns */,
  "information_ratio" REAL /* Information ratio of the security's returns */,
  "tracking_error" REAL /* Tracking error of the security's returns */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the security's returns */,
  "treynor_ratio" REAL /* Treynor ratio of the security's returns */,
  "jensen_alpha" REAL /* Jensen's alpha of the security's returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_performance_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
